mano_cua.result_summary: Source和PlaybackSpeed下拉菜单均可正常弹出并交互，但Source下拉菜单存在Bug：点击视频区域或按Escape无法关闭菜单，只能通过再次点击Source按钮或选择选项关闭。PlaybackSpeed菜单无此问题但缺少当前选中项的标记
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The PlaybackSpeed dropdown closed after selecting x1 (normal speed). Both the Source button and PlaybackSpeed button dropdown menus are functional and visible. However, there is a bug with the Source dropdown not closing when clicking outside of it.
